title: Facet axes registry (D31)
description: datasets/taxonomy/facet-axes.json. Per D31, the canonical registry of every allowed key that may appear in an indicator-catalogue row's dimension_values:STRUCT (D26 facet-explode children). The catalogue validator REJECTS any dimension_values key not in this registry — a guardrail against ad-hoc dimension proliferation as the corpus grows (§0b 500-1,000+ indicators path). New axes require a deliberate PR to this file, not an ad-hoc adapter choice. Each axis carries the controlled-vocabulary of allowed VALUES (so 'fuel_type' can only take 'coal', 'solar', etc.) so the validator catches typos and the renderer can pre-compute legends without scanning observation Parquet.

x-changelog.description: Initial canonical facet axes registry schema (Phase 0.3 of TODO/20260517-canonical-long-format-pivot.md). Per D31 — Gregor's R2 concession term. Seeded axes (populated Phase 0.4): fuel_type, sector, head_of_account, gender, residence, prices_basis, methodology_version, transfer_type, category, crime_category, cpi_category, loss_type. Each axis declares allowed values + a citizen-readable label per value. New axes added by Phase 2/3 ingestion via PR.

axis_id.description: PK. Snake_case. The key that appears in indicator-catalogue row's dimension_values:STRUCT (e.g. 'fuel_type').

label.description: Citizen-readable axis name (e.g. 'Fuel type', 'Head of account'). Used as legend / facet-picker heading when surfaced.

description.description: What this axis MEANS — distinguishes overlapping axes (e.g. 'sector' (industrial / agricultural) vs 'head_of_account' (revenue / capital)).

value_id.description: The value as it appears in dimension_values (e.g. 'coal', 'solar_utility', 'base-2011-12'). kebab-case or snake_case; <=40 chars.

label.description: Citizen-readable label (e.g. 'Coal', 'Solar (utility scale)'). Renderer uses this in legends.

description.description: Optional editorial note (e.g. 'Excludes captive coal capacity').

deprecated.description: When true, the value is grandfathered but no new ingest should use it. Validator warns; doesn't reject.

allow_compute_on_read_total.description: Per D33.8 — when true, the renderer MAY synthesise a 'total' row via SUM(value) GROUP BY entity, year over the children. When false, a published 'total' was authoritative and should be carried as its own indicator (not synthesised).
